string.name: privacy_content
string.value: We attach great importance to protecting your personal information and privacy. Before you use demo, we would like to solemnly explain to you demo\'s User Agreement, Privacy Policy and Children\'s Privacy Policy.

string.name: privacy_user_content
string.value: mainly includes: Scope of application of the agreement, service content and form, software use and licensing, terminal responsibility security, user rights and obligations, user behavior norms, user information protection, etc.

string.name: privacy_pirvace1
string.value: (1) demo belongs to the \"online music category\" APP, with basic functions including \"login and registration, music playback, browsing, downloading\", etc. By agreeing to the basic privacy protection guidelines, you agree to the collection and processing of your necessary IMEI during login registration, music playback, browsing, and downloading provided by this application IMSI, Device MAC address HarmonyOS NEXT ID, OAID(HarmonyOS)、ODID(HarmonyOS)、AAID, ICCID, SN, SUPI, SUCI, Software installation list, location, contacts, call history, calendar, SMS, local phone number, pictures, audio and video, clipboard and other personal information. The personal information collected for providing extended functions will be subject to your separate consent when using specific functions.

string.name: privacy_pirvace2
string.value: (2) Based on the principles of legality, legitimacy and necessity, we will collect information necessary to realize product functions, including: the information you fill in when registering your account (nickname, mobile phone number, etc.): your network log and device information device model: when you choose to use some services, we will obtain the information required to provide the relevant services after obtaining your consent. For example, when you use location-related services, we may obtain the location information of your device.

string.name: privacy_pirvace3
string.value: (3) demo operators have strict data protection and management measures. We will take security measures to protect your personal information from loss, unauthorized access, use, disclosure, modification or damage, and other forms of illegal processing.

string.name: privacy_pirvace4
string.value: (4) You can query, correct, delete your information and manage related authorizations in the App or on your device. We also provide a channel for account cancellation. If you have any comments, suggestions or questions about this announcement and related agreements, you can contact us at support@demo.art

string.value: Log in indicates that you have read and agree to the

string.value: In order to better protect your legal rights and interests, please read and agree to the following agreement

string.name: deleteTip
string.value: This playlist is currently playing. Please switch to another playlist before deleting it.

string.name: logoutC
string.value: Are you sure you want to log out？

string.name: deleteAccount1
string.value: 1、The demo account deletion process includes a 7-day reconsideration period. Once the account is deleted, all data associated with the account will be permanently cleared or anonymized (including but not limited to purchased music packages, playlists, comments, etc.). The account cannot be recovered after deletion, so please proceed with caution.

string.name: deleteAccount2
string.value: 2、After the account is deleted, you can log in again using your phone number.

string.name: deleteAccount3
string.value: 3、The account must have no disputes, including but not limited to complaints or reports, and all services must be completed or voluntarily forfeited.

string.name: readAgreed
string.value: I have read and agreed to

string.name: vip_tip
string.value: Subscribe on Android or iPhone—your account is shared and will work here too.

string.name: vip_tip1
string.value:
To ensure the best experience, payment and subscription features are currently unavailable on HarmonyOS devices.
You can purchase a membership on an Android phone or iPhone—your account is shared across devices, and all premium playlists will be instantly available on this device once subscribed.

string.value: Opening a membership means accepting the

string.name: hintContent1
string.value: You are already a member and do not need to purchase
